name: Cranberry or Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: Fresh Blueberries OR Fresh Cranberries (chopped) - 1 cup
Orange or lemon rind, grated - 1 teaspoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and salt together.
2. Beat eggs in a separate bowl.
3. Add butter and milk to the eggs.
4. Combine the liquid ingredients with the dry ingredients using a few gentle folds.
5. Gently fold in the blueberries or cranberries until just combined.
6. Grease muffin pans and fill them 2/3 full with batter.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
